name: Potato Beetle
description: A much tougher ladybug-like variant that patrols the veggie plots. It stays neutral most of the time, but in combat it hits hard enough to feel like the natural step up from a normal ladybug.
behavior: It moves slowly through its spawn areas and sometimes sleeps beneath dandelions, much like a standard ladybug. The real difference is not in the patrol route, but in how much harder it converts openings into damage once angered.
interactionWithPlayer: It stays completely neutral until attacked and even lets you climb on top while passive. Once combat starts it gains a very real rear punish, so getting too comfortable on the shell stops being free the moment it wakes up.
interactionWithCreatures: It stays neutral toward many creatures, but its size and presence still drag it into fights with more aggressive species like earwigs or black soldier ants.
strategy: Isolate it before the fight. Fresh and busting remain the best answers, while stabbing performs worse. If you already know the ladybug pattern, the real adjustment here is respecting how much harder every mistake gets punished.

combatStats.attackDamageSummary: Bite: 85. Running Charge: 130. Side Hit: 110. Back Buck: 130.

inflicts: Chopping damage on bite and charge; busting damage on the side hit and back buck.

abilities.name: Bite
abilities.description: A basic blockable bite that opens many of its close-range exchanges.

abilities.name: Running Charge
abilities.description: It braces itself and then charges directly forward. It can start this attack from a fair distance away.

abilities.name: Side Hit
abilities.description: It shakes briefly and slams its side into the player. It breaks guard if the block is not perfect.

abilities.name: Back Buck
abilities.description: Used only if the player is standing on top of it. It bucks upward and repeatedly hits the area around its shell.

abilities.name: Roar
abilities.description: It braces itself, roars, and heals over several seconds while also cleansing venom buildup.

abilities.name: Blocking Stance
abilities.description: It retracts its head into its shell and advances slowly, becoming immune to frontal light attacks until interrupted by a charged hit.
